Description: You'll find a story when you next make port. [You'll receive this from time to time as you travel the zee.]
LevelDescriptionText: 0|Nothing awaits you. Time to leave port?~1|Stories await when you next make port.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The waves are flecked with light.~50|Zee-bats cry out. They are nothing like birds.~39|Something drifts, face-down.~47|A false-star flares in the cavern roof directly above you; flares, and fades.~78|A tiny breeze stirs your hair, and dies.~81|Waves slap the side of the ship. Far below, something moves.~40|Some sort of beetle has invaded your morsel of ship's biscuit. It waggles its antennae impertinently.~20|Green glass and basalt. Salt and silence.~37|The glim-lamp at the prow fizzes, arcs.~30|On the horizon, a sickly yellow light glimmers for a moment, then fades.~49|Where is everyone? Where did they go? ...they're here. They're here. You're not alone.~60|Distant bells.~100|Blue lightnings crawl leisurely up the funnel. "St Erasmus dancing!" the cry goes up.~82|Home. Warmly lit windows, company, peace. Thoughts of home come at the strangest times.~90|The air trembles. A breath of change passes...~25|The glassy chop of dark water. The iron clatter of feet at the hatchway.~10|The air carries the scent of salt and shadows.~43|A zailor raises her head, sniffs sharply. Blood on the wind. ~19|The scent of the zee! Salt and frost and cellars. Black spices.~70|Luminescent beasts like eyeless dolphins play in your wake.~68|A zailor is praying.~74|A sluggish wave. The ship pitches.~84|Far off, very far off, someone screams...~86|Laughter from the fore-deck.~88|A belch of smoke goes up from the funnel.~11|The air trembles. A breath of change passes...~12|A belch of smoke goes up from the funnel.~13|Laughter from the fore-deck.~14|Far off, very far off, someone screams...~85|Zee-bats cry out. They are nothing like birds.~16|A zailor is praying.~17|Luminescent beasts like eyeless dolphins play in your wake.~18|A row of watchful zee-bats perch on the ship's railing. Their heads swivel in unison as you cross the deck.~0|That's all for now.~72|A row of watchful zee-bats hang from a cable. Their heads swivel in unison as you cross the deck.~9|A rock breaks the water like a surfacing zee-beast. No, it's a  zee-beast! No, it's a rock.~3|On the Surface, the sun still warms the Earth. Or so one assumes.~5|A brisk spatter of spray. The Unterzee is restless.~7|An electric shiver to the air. Storm is watching, the zailors would say.~22|The waves are cluttered with zee-wrack, like drowned hair drifting.~51|You are being watched.~52|A soft wind from the East. The impossible scent of pine.~53|Waves slap the side of the ship. Far below, something moves.~54|A ship's horn, far away.~55|Blue lightnings crawl leisurely up the funnel. "St Erasmus dancing!" the cry goes up.~150|You are not welcome here. ~101|Something brushes briefly against the shell. The zub shakes.~110|The brightest light cannot reach this depth. That glow is an illusion. ~120|The air is stale. An off-duty crewman keens softly. ~130|Lights glance past the windows. Another zubmarine?  ~140|The Observation Dome is silent. Your navigator's breath is loud in the stillness.~160|A dull tolling echoes around the bridge. A distress bell, now fading.  ~170|A shoal of fish pass by a porthole. The prow-lamp reveals the midnight iridescence of their scales. ~200|The compass shifts in the binnacle. Briefly, you are off-course. The coral is a useless signpost.~190| A diving-suit floats past the glass.~180|The temperature changes abruptly. Your helmsman complains about goosebumps.
Name: Something Awaits You

Description: A past yet to be revealed
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Your "A Stranger" quality has gone. Welcome to the world!~1|A decision has been made.~1000|Welcome.
Name: a stranger

Description: How do you want it all to end? [This determines how you win: although you can always just retire in London, for a draw.]
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Complete the King's Cradle Foundation's commission~2|Retire to a life of luxury~3|Bring peace to the Unterzee~4|Construct a Dream-Device~5|Sail East, beyond the Zee~6|Liberate the secret of immortality
Name: Objective: Ambition

Description: No one was born a zee-captain.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|A Past Wreathed in Shadows~2|A Chimneysweep~3|An Invalid~4|A Soldier~5|A Circus Performer~6|A Gardener~7|An Heir
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|For now, you are a mystery~3|You were a Sickly Invalid. Now, you're a zee-captain~2|You were a Lowly Chimneysweep. Now, you're a zee-captain~4|You were a Weary Soldier. Now, you're a zee-captain~5|You were a Circus Performer. Now, you're a zee-captain~6|You were a Cautious Gardener. Now, you're a zee-captain~7|You were a Slovenly Heir. Now, you're a zee-captain
Name: Memoirs: Your Past

Description: How do they speak to you?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Madam~2|Sir~3|Citizen~4|my lord~5|my lady~6|Captain~7|you magnificent b_stard~8|Mistress~9|my dude~100|(mumble)
Name: Addressed As

LevelDescriptionText: 1|Devoured~2|Hunted~3|Lost~4|Illuminated~5|Home
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have begun to suffer nightmares of a vast Mouth~2|You have begun to suffer nightmares of a Dark Lady~3|You have begun to suffer nightmares of a shadowed city~4|You have begun to suffer nightmares of a dawning Sun~5|You have begun to suffer nightmares of an eerie landscape
Name: Menaces: A Recurring Nightmare

Description: The Admiralty has a task for you. Visit the named port to retrieve Strategic Intelligence, and return it to the Admiralty.

ChangeDescriptionText: 0|You've completed your Commission - return to the Admiralty.~1|Retrieve Strategic Information from Laennec's Retreat, somewhere not far from home waters~3|Retrieve Strategic Information from Bestiary, somewhere not far from home waters~2|Retrieve Strategic Information from The Old Magnanery, somewhere not far from home waters~4|Retrieve Strategic Information from End Paren, far north of London~5|Retrieve Strategic Information from Aditta, somewhere north-east of London~6|Retrieve Strategic Information from Silver's Palace, somewhere north-east of London~7|Retrieve Strategic Information from Crying Heights, far south of London~8|Retrieve Strategic Information from Château-Dessous, somewhere south-east of London~9|Retrieve Strategic Information from The Krakenchute, somewhere south-east of London~10|Retrieve Strategic Information from the Paradise of Thorns, somewhere south-east of London~11|Retrieve Strategic Information from Henson's Landing, somewhere a good way east of London~12|Retrieve Strategic Information from Seaglass, somewhere a good way east of London~13|Retrieve Strategic Information from Neokamakura, somewhere a good way east of London~14|Retrieve Strategic Information from the Kirai Komainu, far to the East~15|Retrieve Strategic Information from the Theatre of Tyrants, far to the south-east

Description: You are seeking the phrase that will open a whisper-locked sea-chest.
LevelDescriptionText: 0|A certain matter is now resolved.~1|The Scholar suggested you seek answers in Sunshade Redoubt, far south of London.~2|The Quivering Automaton suggested you seek the Director at Founder's Island.~3|Go to Your Lodgings to seek answers in Arbor.~4|An untrustworthy gentleman suggested you seek an authority in Namerigawa.~5|The Inattentive Élite suggested you seek Mr. Feathers at Trojan's Rook.~6|Decide what to do with the box.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|A certain matter is now resolved.~1|The Scholar suggested you seek answers in Sunshade Redoubt, far south of London.~2|The Quivering Automaton suggested you seek the Director at Founder's Island.~3|Go to Your Lodgings to seek answers in Arbor.~4|An untrustworthy gentleman suggested you seek an authority in Namerigawa.~5|The Inattentive Élite suggested you seek Mr. Feathers at Trojan's Rook.~6|Decide what to do with the box.

ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You accepted the proposal~2|You agreed to smuggle rats from London to Bestiary~101|You refused the proposal~3|You delivered rats to Bestiary~5|You've been asked to pick something up...~4|You were paid~6|You've been given a task...

Description: He does not tolerate fools or failure.

LevelDescriptionText: 1|You have not looked for him at Laennec's Retreat
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The Gentleman Thief has been seen at Laennec's Retreat.
Name: The Gentleman Thief: Laennec's Retreat

LevelDescriptionText: 1|You have not looked for him at the Old Magnanery
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The Gentleman Thief has been seen at the Old Magnanery
Name: The Gentleman Thief: The Old Magnanery

Description: Could making deals with departing miners?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You have not looked for him at the Infernal Canal
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The Gentleman Thief has been seen at the Infernal Canal.
Name: The Gentleman Thief: The Infernal Canal

Description: You seek him here, you seek him there.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You are looking for the Gentleman Thief.
Name: The Gentleman Thief: On The Trail

Description: Is he picking the pockets of the flesh-workers?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You have not looked for him at the Krakenchute
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The Gentleman Thief has been seen at the Krakenchute.
Name: The Gentleman Thief: The Krakenchute

Description: Perhaps a payment awaits you.
Name: Another Day: Pirate's Pleasure

Description: A market for collectors and eccentrics throngs on Roser's Wharf.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Today, collectors of antiquities are trying to prevent their collections from gathering any more dust.~13|Today, a recent flood of luxuries has most of Veilgarden regretting their impulsive purchases.~26|Today, furtive collectors are looking for the trade of a lifetime. The constables are on strict watch for pickpockets.~39|Today, a consortium of dubiously legitimate wreck-haulers is out to make use of their latest salvage.~52|Today, snobbish nobles are here to show off their collections. Any trades made are merely incidental.~65|Today, various sects of the Three Wyrms are sizing each other up. Whomever has the holiest artefacts IS the holiest, after all.~78|Today, the University has opened its doors. Test subjects are needed urgently.~91|Today, the market is almost silent. Trades are conducted in whispers. Eavesdroppers strain to pick up something new.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Rose-Market has concluded, for now.~1|The Rose-Market bustles on Roser's Wharf. Who will be there today?
Name: Another Day: The Rose-Market

Description: Let's go!
LevelDescriptionText: 0|The race is on!~10|The race is off.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The race is on!~10|The race is off.
Name: A Day at the Races

Description: Buzz buzz.
LevelDescriptionText: 0|The Swarm hungers~10|The Swarm has been destroyed
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Swarm hungers~10|The Swarm has been destroyed
Name: State of the Swarm

Description: There is a yearning.
Name: End Paren: Familiarity

Description: There is a yearning.
Name: End Paren: A House of Questions

Description: The mines are primarily for coal, but it's the side products that everyone cares about.
LevelDescriptionText: 0|You are uninvolved with the mines at Dis.~1|Take the Miner to Dis.~2|The mines of Dis are shut.~4|The mines of Dis are closed permanently.~3|The mines are open!
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|You are uninvolved with the mines at Dis.~1|Take the Miner to Dis.~2|The mines of Dis are shut.~4|The mines of Dis are closed permanently.~3|The mines are open!
Name: Objective: Jade Mining

Description: Jade is good, just not too much. [Speak to the Shogunate politely or send them a violent message.]
Name: Jade Mining: Shogunate Interference

Description: Accidents in the dark? Or something more sinister? [Investigate the disappearances or help to cover them up.]
Name: Jade Mining: Missing Miners

Description: No one can work without their coffee. [Go to Port Rosa to figure out why the shipment hasn't arrived, or deliver it yourself.]
Name: Jade Mining: Late Shipments

Description: The heart is a heedless hunter. [You are engaged in a discreet liaison with one of your Officers.]
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Perplexed Helmsman~2|Unlicensed Therapist~3|Incomparable Actress~4|Intrusive Ozao~5|Tilted Tinkerer~6|Noxious Butcher~7|Wide-Eyed Occultist~8|Sunny Surfacer~9|Posey

LevelDescriptionText: 1|Kaifuku~5|Sairai~7|Kagayakashī~2|Yūbō~3|Jūyōna~4|Jūdai~6|Tohōmonai
Name: Supremacy: The Shogunate

Description: We sleep. We hunger. We rise.
LevelDescriptionText: 5|Napping~7|AWAKENED~4|Slumbering~3|Dozing~1|Sleeping~6|Dreaming~2|Snoozing
Name: Supremacy: Ozao Remnants

Description: Such quiet, clever little things.
LevelDescriptionText: 5|Pollinating~7|Infested~4|Budding~3|Growing~1|Seeding~6|Spreading~2|Germinating

Description: She's watching you, from wherever she is.

Name: The Gods of the Zee: Shade's Attention

Description: A curse lies on you: the curse of the great Wyrm of the depths.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Shade's curse lies on you
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Shade's curse lies on you
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Shade's Curse

Description: There are powers.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You know something of the three gods of the zee.
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Sleet, Shade and Silver

Description: He's watching you, perhaps from closer than you think.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You now have the Gods of the Zee: Silver's Attention
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have the Gods of the Zee: Silver's Attention.
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Silver's Attention

Description: You carry a curse: the curse of the great Wyrm of wealth and fortune.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Silver's Curse lies on you
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Silver's Curse lies on you.
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Silver's Curse

Description: A mighty hunger knows you.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You now have the Gods of the Zee: Sleet's Attention
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have the Gods of the Zee: Sleet's Attention.
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Sleet's Attention

Description: A curse lies on you: the curse of the great Wyrm of weather and hunger.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Sleet's curse lies on you
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Sleet's curse lies on you
Name: The Gods of the Zee: Sleet's Curse

Description: The things you'll do for your employer...

Description: The best listeners have the best stories.
Name: The Gallery of Sentences: Floors Unlocked

Description: Higher. Higher!
Name: The Gallery of Sentences: Floors Explored

Description: Stony shards protrude from the most uncomfortable of places.
Name: Menaces: Cragwarts

Description: Thick, yellow tears refuse to stop flowing.
Name: Menaces: Weeping Sickness

Description: Something at the back of your throat refuses to dislodge.
Name: Menaces: Cancroid Cough

Description: You are haunted by ghosts of the past.
Name: Menaces: Aghemnia

Description: Indentations along your features mark you as one of the stricken.
Name: Menaces: Pitpox

Description: Hurry on, we don't have all day!
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|It is time to return to your ship.~1|Moving along...
Name: Bestiary: The Zoo Path Shuffle

Description: No circuses.
LevelDescriptionText: 200|The Piercing Inspector has departed.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You sided with the Piercing Inspector.~2|Bring a package from Hermitage to the Piercing Inspector.~3|You've established trust with the Piercing Inspector.~200|The Piercing Inspector has departed.
Name: Bestiary: Dealings with the Piercing Inspector

Description: For the last time, it's a zoo.
LevelDescriptionText: 3|Collect packages from Aditta, Port Rosa, or Ztargon's Remains.~199|The Nefarious Zookeeper is no more.~200|The Nefarious Zookeeper has departed.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You sided with the Nefarious Zookeeper.~2|Bring a package from Hermitage to the Nefarious Zookeeper.~3|Collect packages from Aditta, Port Rosa, or Ztargon's Remains.~199|The Nefarious Zookeeper is no more.~200|The Nefarious Zookeeper has departed.
Name: Bestiary: Dealings with the Nefarious Zookeeper

Description: Your network needs you.
Name: Networks: An Opportunity - Château-Dessous

Description: You have spies in Château-Dessous.
Name: Networks: Château-Dessous

Description: Travel deep enough, and you'll find something interesting.
LevelDescriptionText: 0|You've returned from the World of Light!
ChangeDescriptionText: 10|Something looming...~20|A feeling of being watched...~30|Destroyed structures...~40|Piercing cold...~50|Somewhere, a moan...~60|Invisible architecture...~70|Oily secretions...~80|Unending light...~90|Frigid landscapes...~1|A distant roar...~100|Something that doesn't belong...
Name: Another Day: The World of Light

Description: It can't be closed off to everyone. [Someone in End Paren may know more.]
Name: The Machine: A Way In

Description: Woe betide those who treat the Machine poorly.
Name: The Machine: Machinist's Terror

Description: Treat the Machine kindly, and it will be kind to you.
Name: The Machine: Trust of the Machine

Description: You've fed the Machine.
Name: The Machine: Maintenance (A)

Description: You've pleased the Machine.
Name: The Machine: Maintenance (B)

Description: You've aided the Machine.
Name: The Machine: Maintenance (C)

Description: You've cleaned the Machine.
Name: The Machine: Maintenance (D)

Description: You've read from the Machine.
Name: The Machine: Maintenance (E)

Description: But to what?
Name: The Machine: The Key

Description: A tradition old as time.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You've brought children to London.~100|Bring children to Ztargon's Remains or release them in London.~200|You brought children to the Ozao.~201|You released children in London.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've brought children to London.~100|Bring children to Ztargon's Remains or release them in London.~200|You brought children to the Ozao.~201|You released children in London.
Name: Objective: The Oldest Profession

Description: Making a baby isn't what it used to be. [Go to The Human Factory to pick up a child.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your sweetheart is ready to have a child.
Name: Romance: a Notable Occasion

Description: What flavour this is you cannot imagine. Perhaps that's the point.
Name: Hermitage: Judgment's Egg

Description: Can hermit-slugs eat this? You hope the Face knows what it's doing.
Name: Hermitage: Salt

Description: You have options, though not many. What dares grow in the Neath?
Name: Hermitage: Something Grown

Description: How sweet need the honey be?
Name: Hermitage: Sweetest Honey

Description: Good for the soul, or so they claim.
Name: Hermitage: Soup

Description: One day, the zee. One day.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Seek Swarmspice in Culicida.~2|Listen.~3|Fulfil Who Weeps' requests.~4|The matter of the Intrusive Ozao has been settled.~5|The matter of Who Weeps' distress has been settled.~7|You received a most peculiar reward.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Seek Swarmspice in Culicida.~2|Listen.~3|Fulfil Who Weeps' requests.~4|The matter of the Intrusive Ozao has been settled.~5|The matter of Who Weeps' distress has been settled.~7|You received a most peculiar reward.
Name: Hermitage: Who Weeps' Hunger

Description: Playtime never ends.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You are known to the Fae.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You are known to the Fae.
Name: Faeble: The Fae

Description: Unless you're rather young for a zee-captain, these are unlikely to grow back.
Name: Missing Teeth

Description: You won't be very well off without these.
Name: Missing Eyes

Description: How refreshing!
Name: Freshly Bathed

Description: This'll come back to bite you, no doubt.
Name: Intoxication

Description: Couldn't you just stay here forever?
Name: The Palace's Pull

Description: Addictive, isn't it?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The game is on!
Name: A Game of Chance

Description: This will allow you to descend into the beast's flesh.
Name: Krakenchute Permit

Description: A Crooked Vendor is selling Parabola-Linen at bargain prices.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Parabola-Linen is for sale.~30|Sold out!
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Buy another?~30|Sold out!
Name: Favours: Selling Scraps

Description: The... sun?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You know a little too much.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You know a little too much.
Name: Sunshade Redoubt: Twilight Hours

Description: Who rules this place?
LevelDescriptionText: 0|Dyi Ztar~1|Port Jasper~2|Shitakyoto~3|Dyi Ztar~4|Orchid Island
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|A new force rules Dyi Ztar
Name: Dyi Ztar's Name

Description: Are you sure you know what you're doing?
Name: Rath Ruin: That Sinking Feeling

Description: Your name is known to those trapped by the Resort.
Name: Zyme Resort: Contacts

Description: They're willing to give you a wide berth. For safety, of course.
Name: Zyme Resort: Security

Description: An unlikely friendship blossoms.
Name: Zyme Resort: The Paranoid Mutterer

Description: Just how long was she here?
Name: Zyme Resort: The Scorned Translator

Description: The stirrings of revolution.
Name: Zyme Resort: Last Request

Description: A full mouth has loose lips.
Name: Zyme Resort: Grub's Up

Description: Worth the risk?
Name: Zyme Resort: Fresh Air

Description: Even without light, your actions have been observed.
Name: Zyme Resort: Sunlight

Description: Does she watch, even now?
Name: Zyme Resort: The Bone Warden

Description: Uh-oh.
Name: Zyme Resort: In Chaos

Description: You've welcomed a stranger aboard your ship. This may lead to complications.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Consequences wait.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Welcome aboard!~0|A certain matter has become clear.
