Description: Do those legs go all the way up?
Name: The Old Magnanery: The Songweaver

Description: Musicians only have so much in them, Toadie.
Name: Unterzee Tour: Gigs Played

Description: Now here's a place that knows how to groove!
Name: Unterzee Tour: Namerigawa

Description: Weird vibes, but a great crowd.
Name: Unterzee Tour: Paradise of Thorns

Description: Whole venue was packed, Toadie!
Name: Unterzee Tour: Bestiary

Description: Who knew Londoners knew how to party?
Name: Unterzee Tour: Fallen London

Description: Now we're hitting the big time, Toadie!
Name: Unterzee Tour: Theatre of Tyrants

Description: Smaller audience, but they knew their stuff!
Name: Unterzee Tour: Castle Kysamoto

Description: How well did the tour go?
Name: Unterzee Tour: Score

Description: How well did the tour go?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|The Millipede Maestro wants something...
Name: Unterzee Tour: Last-Minute Demands

Description: Being at the top need not be dull.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Bring a London Flag to Château-Dessous.~2|Just one more thing...~3|Welcome to Club Concert!~4|You have been banned from Club Concert.
Name: Château-Dessous: Exclusive Invitation

Description: How much should players fear you?
Name: Château-Dessous: Elo Rating

Description: You've engaged in a spot of wanton destruction. [Pick up your spoils at Crying Heights.]
Name: Château-Dessous: Playtime Plunder

Description: How do all these operators of high-powered torches communicate over such long dist- Oh, you've answered your own question.
Name: Favours: Light-Ship Network

Description: Ironically, they just want to be left alone.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Bring a gift or a warning to Mr Feathers.~2|Report back to any light-ship.~3|A certain matter has been concluded.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Bring a gift or a warning to Mr Feathers.~2|Report back to any light-ship.~3|A certain matter has been concluded.
Name: Objective: Operators' Revenge

Description: You've received an archeologist's welcome.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You are welcome in the Inverted Quarter.
Name: The Inverted Quarter: Accepted

Description: Deeper, deeper! Into the known!
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You have funded an expedition to the First City.~2|You have funded an expedition to the Second City.~3|You have funded an expedition to the Third City.~4|You have funded an expedition to the Fourth City.~5|You have funded an expedition to the Fifth City.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Your expedition has concluded.~1|You have funded an expedition to the First City.~2|You have funded an expedition to the Second City.~3|You have funded an expedition to the Third City.~4|You have funded an expedition to the Fourth City.~5|You have funded an expedition to the Fifth City.
Name: The Inverted Quarter: Expeditions

Description: How long until they return?
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Your expedition should be back by now!~1|Your expedition is still exploring.
Name: The Inverted Quarter: Progress

Description: Your triumph has become even more triumphant.
Name: A Hearty Salad: Heart of a Squid

Description: A little seed in the right place can sprout a mighty oak.
Name: Favours: A Growing Seedling

Description: You are the one who lurks.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Movement in the stalactite.
Name: New Newgate: Incarceration

Description: It's too brilliant for words.
Name: New Newgate: The Great Escape

Description: Something is here.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Something is here.~100|A certain matter is concluded, for now.
Name: New Newgate: Deeper

Description: Oh, joy. Politics.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've been welcomed into the Foreign Office.
Name: Kantai: The Foreign Office

Description: How long until the rise? Don't get left behind.
Name: Time in Ryūgū-jō

Description: FREE HIM
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The barrier is very, very strong. This may take some time.~100|Fragments are beginning to splinter off the surface.~300|You're making some progress.~500|Deep cracks are beginning to show.~700|The wall cracks and groans with each blow.~900|The barrier is nearly destroyed.~1000|One more hit will shatter it.
Name: Ryūgū-jō: A Crystal Barrier

Description: He lives only in you, now.
Name: Ryūgū-jō: What You Found in the Dark

Description: You've got something precious to deliver.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Deliver to either the Nefarious Zookeeper or the Piercing Inspector.
Name: Bestiary: Special Delivery!

Description: Don't mess this up. Or do.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Deliver to either the Nefarious Zookeeper or the Piercing Inspector.
Name: Bestiary: Proof of Purchase

Description: You've seen horrors before, but this? This is the WORST.
Name: Doom: Ticket Prices

Description: It can never happen again.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Convince the Apathetic Consul to work with you.~2|Return to the Apathetic Consul.~3|Satisfy the needs of London, the Shogunate, the Ozao, and the Umwelt Dynasty.~4|Host your peace summit at the Theatre of Tyrants.~5|You have brought peace to the Unterzee.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Convince the Apathetic Consul to work with you.~2|Return to the Apathetic Consul.~3|Satisfy the needs of London, the Shogunate, the Ozao, and the Umwelt Dynasty.~4|Host your peace summit at the Theatre of Tyrants.~5|You have brought peace to the Unterzee.
Name: Objective: Peace

Description: What will it take for London to seek peace?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Discover London's demands.~2|Confirm the death of the Dastardly Daimyō.~3|Return to the Apathetic Consul.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Discover London's demands.~2|Confirm the death of the Dastardly Daimyō.~3|Return to the Apathetic Consul.
Name: Objective: London's Demands

Description: Surely the Shogun has a heart?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Shogun's demands.~2|Meet with Mr Misery at London's drydocks.~3|Provide materials for the ship's hull.~4|Provide a prow-lamp for the ship.~5|Provide an engine for the ship.~6|One more thing...~7|Return to the Ardent Analyst.~9|Bring a substantial bribe to the Ardent Analyst.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Shogun's demands.~2|Meet with Mr Misery at London's drydocks.~3|Provide materials for the ship's hull.~4|Provide a prow-lamp for the ship.~5|Provide an engine for the ship.~6|One more thing...~7|Return to the Ardent Analyst.~9|Bring a substantial bribe to the Ardent Analyst.
Name: Objective: Shogunate Demands

Description: They do want things, right?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Ozao's demands.~2|Figure out what the Ozao want.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Ozao's demands.~2|Figure out what the Ozao want.
Name: Objective: Ozao Demands

Description: How does one appease flowers?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Umwelt Dynasty's demands.~2|Solve three mysteries across the zee.~3|Solve two more mysteries across the zee.~4|Solve one more mystery across the zee.~5|Speak to the Aquamarine Administrator again.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Discover the Umwelt Dynasty's demands.~2|Solve three mysteries across the zee.~3|Solve two more mysteries across the zee.~4|Solve one more mystery across the zee.~5|Speak to the Aquamarine Administrator again.
Name: Objective: Umwelt Demands

Description: You've gained some insight into dealing with the Ozao.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Advice

Description: Truth is the fire that will forge this friendship.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: An Enigma

Description: Trust is built on respect.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Flags

Description: Show them what they could become.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Lucent Soul

Description: Now you're speaking their language.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Combat

Description: Everything needs to eat.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Supplies

Description: No coward are you!
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Trophies

Description: Wars have been stopped for less.
Name: Ozaean Gifts: Scintillack

Description: How it spoke to you...
Name: Three Wishes: The Gallery of Sentences

Description: How the skull seemed to stare at you...
Name: Three Wishes: The Bone Warden

Description: The smell of that gaping mouth...
Name: Three Wishes: Who Weeps

Description: How the puppet waved...
Name: Three Wishes: Pando

Description: How the ticker tape shone...
Name: Three Wishes: The Machine's Output

Description: Your network needs you.
Name: Networks: An Opportunity - Neokamakura

Description: You have spies in Neokamakura.
Name: Networks: Neokamakura

Description: None of us are free until all of us are free.
Name: Neokamakura: Winds of Change

Description: There's a good reason things have been done this way for a long time.
Name: Neokamakura: Strength in Tradition

Description: Imagination is powerful but fickle.
Name: Mekhane: Expedition into Madness

Description: He'll see it through, for Queen and country.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have greeted the Apathetic Consul.~2|You are growing closer to the Apathetic Consul.~9|The Apathetic Consul suspects you! This opportunity is lost.~10|The Apathetic Consul is dead!
Name: Ambassadors: The Apathetic Consul

Description: Born to bear the brunt of rulership, with none of the dividends. What must that do to a man?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have greeted the Shogun's Shadow.~2|You are growing closer to the Shogun's Shadow.~9|The Shogun's Shadow suspects you! This opportunity is lost.~10|The Shogun's Shadow is dead!
Name: Ambassadors: The Shogun's Shadow

Description: A blunt instrument for a complex job. Or it would be, if not for the teeth.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have greeted the Befuddled Ozao.~2|You are growing closer to the Befuddled Ozao.~9|The Befuddled Ozao suspects you! This opportunity is lost.~10|The Befuddled Ozao is dead!
Name: Ambassadors: The Befuddled Ozao

Description: It knows how these things usually go. But how will THIS one go?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have greeted the Dignified Sunflower.~2|You are growing closer to the Dignified Sunflower.~9|The Dignified Sunflower suspects you! This opportunity is lost.~10|The Dignified Sunflower is dead!
Name: Ambassadors: The Dignified Sunflower

Description: You can never show your face there again.
Name: Doom: Bardic Mockery

Description: And I don't want to hear any "Well, actually..." from anyone!
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Go to Your Lodgings to found your cult.~2|Bring your cult an Arcane Artifact.~3|Designate a Cult Headquarters.~4|Begin recruitment.~5|Begin growing your cult.~6|Continue growing your cult.~8|You are ready to face Mr Feathers.~9|Return to London in glory~10|Your cult has been disbanded.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Go to Your Lodgings to found your cult.~2|Bring your cult an Arcane Artifact.~3|Designate a Cult Headquarters.~4|Begin recruitment.~5|Begin growing your cult.~6|Continue growing your cult.~8|You are ready to face Mr Feathers.~9|Return to London in glory.~10|Your cult has been disbanded.
Name: Objective: Godhood

Description: All for one.
Name: Your Cult: Cult Strength

Description: Something odd is going on around here. [Don't let this reach 10.]
Name: Your Cult: Unwanted Attention

Description: Dratted government, interfering in the affairs of would-be deities!
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Ministry has departed.~1|The Ministry is watching.~2|The Ministry is no more.
Name: Your Cult: Ministry of Rational Belief

Description: It was never about the children.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|MAMA has departed.~1|MAMA is watching.~2|MAMA is no more.
Name: Your Cult: MAMA

Description: You can't risk people being informed. They might start to think for themselves.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Cult Awareness Network has departed.~1|The Cult Awareness Network is watching.~2|The Cult Awareness Network is no more.
Name: Your Cult: Cult Awareness Network

Description: What's in a name? What isn't?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|The Penumbra~2|The Wailing~3|Reverent's Club~4|The Society of St Chambers~5|Citizens Underneath the Light of Truth
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've chosen a name.
Name: Your Cult: The Name

Description: The second fiddle pulls the strings.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Glycon~2|Moonman~3|Great Eye~4|Thognnolbahthr'methatygh'lorh~5|Baskins
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've chosen a deity.
Name: Your Cult: The Belief

Description: It's got to be eye-catching. It's got to have class.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|mauve~2|taupe~3|goldenrod~4|crimson~5|cerulean
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've chosen a colour.
Name: Your Cult: The Robes

Description: What ARE those mysterious people up to, and how can I join in?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|blood sacrifices~2|witches' sabbaths~3|wanton lechery~4|hallucinogenic mushrooms~5|wine and cheese nights
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've chosen a pastime.
Name: Your Cult: The Activities

Description: Never neglect the power of a spooky environment.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|library~2|observatory~3|bat-filled cave~4|orphanage~5|church~6|cathedral
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've chosen a headquarters.~5|You've improved your headquarters.
Name: Your Cult: The Locale

Description: You can't stick around all day. You'd lose the mystique.
Name: Your Cult: Quality Time

Description: Let's do this.
Name: Your Cult: A Name Made

Description: What have those rascals been up to?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your cult is awaiting your instructions.
Name: Your Cult: The Stroke of Midnight

Description: When there's business to be done, when there's hearts that can be won, who will you call?
Name: The Crooks: Invitation to Business

Description: You're owed this many favours.
Name: The Crooks: Crooks' Tally

Description: Behold the power of things completely made up!
Name: The Crooks: Crooked Artifacts

Description: Midnight doesn't end until the clock strikes thirteen.
Name: The Crooks: Crooked Timepiece

Description: Who's rational now? Jerks.
Name: Crushed!: Ministry of Rational Belief

Description: 'Mothers For Kindly Righteousness' doesn't have the same ring.
Name: Crushed!: MAMA

Description: Oh, they'll be aware of you now. They all will be.
Name: Crushed!: Cult Awareness Network

Description: They're still blind, but now they see. Sort of.
Name: Your Cult: Laennec's Retreat

Description: They once had something to live for. Now they have something to die for.
Name: Your Cult: End Paren

Description: When the reckoning comes, you can have as many legs as you want.
Name: Your Cult: The Old Magnanery

Description: Why does this holy scripture have typos?
Name: Your Cult: Paradise of Thorns

Description: One temple among many, more equal than the others.
Name: Your Cult: Neokamakura

Description: Come to think of it, have you ever actually seen a whale?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Investigate the trapped whaling ships.~2|Bring the trapped whalers home.~10|A certain matter has been resolved. Or has it?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Investigate the trapped whaling ships.~2|Bring the trapped whalers home.~10|A certain matter has been resolved. Or has it?
Name: Objective: Trapped Whalers

Description: What have you brought upon yourself?
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|You will never feel entirely safe again.~1|Something is pursuing your ship.~2|Did it work?
Name: Doom: It Follows

Description: You've defeated this many Shogunate ships.
Name: Jade Mining: Sending a Message

Description: An ordinary, respectable venture with no strings attached? What kind of zee-captain are you?
LevelDescriptionText: 0|You have completed Silver's venture~1|Bring Supplies to Henson's Landing~2|Bring Supplies to Laennec's Retreat~3|Bring Supplies to Culicida~4|Bring Supplies to the Krakenchute
Name: Objective: Silver's Decree

Description: You cannot fight what you cannot comprehend.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Flee! Flee, like the vermin you are!~1|What is this place? The air weaves with something unnatural.~20|Resentment hangs like a shroud. You must stifle sobs.~40|You've been here before. Are you going in circles? Or...~60|A stink of something like rot.~80|You're sure you've read a story like this before. But when?~100|You have found something.
Name: Understanding

Description: Worthy trials for a worthy captain.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|And don't you DARE come back...~1|A shadow passes underneath you. Nothing overhead.~26|Movement among the trees. Or is it the trees themselves?~51|Something blinks at you from the underbrush, then vanishes.~76|Whispers on the edge of hearing. Are you being followed?
Name: Infiltration

Description: You can't. You can't!
Name: Paranoia

Description: What a question this poses!
LevelDescriptionText: 1|You've met Posey.~2|Make a decision about Posey.~3|You've welcomed Posey aboard your ship.~4|Bring Posey to Wyrmsmouth, Silver's Palace, and the Krakenchute.~7|Bring Posey's reports to the Old Magnanery.~8|Bring Posey to the Paradise of Thorns.~9|Bring Posey to the King's Cradle Foundation.~10|Bring Posey to Reality's Edge.~100|Posey has departed.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've met Posey.~2|Make a decision about Posey.~3|You've welcomed Posey aboard your ship.~4|Bring Posey to Wyrmsmouth, Silver's Palace, and the Krakenchute.~7|Bring Posey's reports to the Old Magnanery.~8|Bring Posey to the Paradise of Thorns.~9|Bring Posey to the King's Cradle Foundation.~10|Bring Posey to Reality's Edge.~100|Posey has departed.
Name: Learning About: Posey

Description: When she rains, she pours.
Name: Port Rosa: A Bellicose Bluebell

Description: You've met someone familiar.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Nobody~2|Wise Mentor~5|Old Ringmaster~6|Employer's Daughter~3|Aged Nurse~4|Commanding Officer~7|Zeefaring Aunt~8|Nobody
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You've met Nobody.~2|You've reunited with your Wise Mentor.~3|You've reunited with your Aged Nurse.~4|You've reunited with your Commanding Officer.~5|You've reunited with your Old Ringmaster.~6|You've reunited with your Employer's Daughter.~7|You've reunited with your Zeefaring Aunt.~8|She is gone.
Name: Faeble: Her Name

Description: What a mind it must have once contained!
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Find Inkarri's Head in Fallen London's Inverted Quarter.~2|Bring Inkarri's Head to Faeble.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Find Inkarri's Head in Fallen London's Inverted Quarter.~2|Bring Inkarri's Head to Faeble.
Name: Faeble: Inkarri's Head

Description: They look like such strong hands, don't they?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Negotiate with Silver for Inkarri's Arms.~2|Bring Inkarri's Arms to Faeble.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Negotiate with Silver for Inkarri's Arms.~2|Bring Inkarri's Arms to Faeble.
Name: Faeble: Inkarri's Arms

Description: Who needs arms with legs like these?
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Seek Inkarri's Legs within ???.~2|Bring Inkarri's Legs to Faeble.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Seek Inkarri's Legs within ???.~2|Bring Inkarri's Legs to Faeble.
Name: Faeble: Inkarri's Legs

Description: You've only got two arms, and you'd like to keep them both.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You failed to find anything.~2|You have all that you can carry for now.
Name: Faeble: All You Can Carry

Description: Snuff out the light!
Name: SEEKING: Extinguished Candles

Description: Fine by thee, indeed.
Name: SEEKING: St Athanor's Candle

Description: Nothing like the sound of silence.
Name: SEEKING: St Eastwood's Candle

Description: Is there a guide somewhere for all these candles?
Name: SEEKING: St Exotico's Candle

Description: But soft, what light!
Name: SEEKING: St Crumbish's Candle

Description: What might this illuminate? Use your eyes.
Name: SEEKING: St Tabibito's Candle

Description: What hands shaped this?
Name: SEEKING: St Dratoran's Candle

Description: It smells of salt and promise.
Name: SEEKING: St Gavner's Candle

Description: Keep this up and history will not remember you.
Name: SEEKING: St Brogues' Candle

Description: Complain early.
Name: SEEKING: St Auriculas' Candle

Description: How it glinted in the candlelight...
Name: Three Wishes: Shade's Children

Description: For the best?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You kept the nature of the jade a secret.~2|You caused a calamity to prevent a worse one in the future.
Name: Jade Mining: Shade's Children

Description: Hard times liquefy men.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Speak to an Arahant to begin your journey.~2|Seek out the Three Wyrms.~3|You are ready to receive the Eternal Flame.~4|You have become a Molten Monk.~5|You were a Molten Monk.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Speak to an Arahant to begin your journey.~2|Seek out the Three Wyrms.~3|You are ready to receive the Eternal Flame.~4|You have become a Molten Monk.~5|You were a Molten Monk.
Name: Objective: The Path to Enlightenment

Description: Crawling in your skin, these wounds refuse to heal...
LevelDescriptionText: 1|From now on, only two Wounds will kill you.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|From now on, only two Wounds will kill you.
Name: Doom: Sleet's Scar

Description: Who's a hungry boy, then? It's Sleet. He is the hungry boy.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Sate Sleet's hunger.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Sleet's hunger is sated.~1|Sate Sleet's hunger.
Name: Aditta: Seeking Sleet

Description: Don't be a miser, now. Someone'll sic ghosts on ya.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Give to Silver.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Silver is content.~1|Give to Silver.
Name: Aditta: Seeking Silver

Description: Hmm.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Find Shade.~2|Shade has invited you to the Human Factory.~3|Await her arrival.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|Shade enjoyed her time with you.~1|Find Shade.~2|Shade has invited you to the Human Factory.~3|Await her arrival.
Name: Aditta: Seeking Shade

Description: If you want to zail, you gotta run with the sharks.
Name: Doom: Silver's Due

Description: Be not afraid. Be terrified.
Name: Doom: Shade's Kiss

Description: There's something to untangle here.
Name: Faeble: Glimmers of Truth

Description: Just when you thought it was all over...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Something has changed...~2|You are as close to the truth as you will ever get.
Name: Faeble: An Epilogue

Description: What have you done?
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Oh no.~2|If you return to London again, something terrible will happen.~3|London is gone.
Name: Doom: London's End

Description: It's romantic if you don't think about it too hard.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Grow a bouquet for the Echo Bazaar.~2|Deliver your bouquet to the Echo Bazaar.~3|Deliver the bad news to the Maudlin Magnolia.~8|Deliver the good news to the Maudlin Magnolia!~9|Your work here is done.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Grow a bouquet for the Echo Bazaar.~2|Deliver your bouquet to the Echo Bazaar.~3|Deliver the bad news to the Maudlin Magnolia.~8|Deliver the good news to the Maudlin Magnolia!~9|Your work here is done.
Name: Port Rosa: Spreading the Love

Description: How big are the little ones?
Name: Port Rosa: Seedling Growth

Description: You don't need to tell them about the dragons. Children know there are dragons.
Name: Port Rosa: Seedling Curiosity

Description: The best way to live is for someone else's benefit.
Name: Port Rosa: Seedling Fascination

Description: Don't you go filling their little heads with big ideas!
Name: Port Rosa: Seedling Wonder

Description: This isn't morbid at all!
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You have a bouquet of glass roses.~2|You have a bouquet of red roses.~3|You have a bouquet of white roses.~4|You have a bouquet of pink roses.~5|You have a bouquet of yellow roses.~6|You have a brilliant bouquet of many-coloured roses.
Name: Port Rosa: A Beautiful Bouquet

Description: Nothing could survive out here. Not even you.
Name: Across the Ice: Progress

Description: Gifts.
Name: Across the Ice: Supplies

Description: Food.
Name: Across the Ice: Crew

Description: There is courage in never, ever, EVER giving up. A few other things as well, too.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Wait, where did she go?
Name: Extraordinary People: The Obstinate Ninja

Description: It's lucky you crossed paths. Lucky for who, though?
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Fortunate Scion is dead!~1|You've met the Fortunate Scion.~2|The Fortunate Scion is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Fortunate Scion's room.~4|You've accused the Fortunate Scion.~5|The Fortunate Scion is wounded!~100|The Fortunate Scion was the murderer!~101|The Fortunate Scion was the murderer's accomplice!~180|The Fortunate Scion has disappeared.~200|In the end, the Fortunate Scion survived.
Name: Suspects: The Fortunate Scion

Description: He carries the wretched scent of someone who has not yet realized they are already dead.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Crumbling Elder is dead!~1|You've met the Crumbling Elder.~100|The Crumbling Elder was the murderer!
Name: Suspects: The Crumbling Elder

Description: A man with a storied past and stormy present.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Pompous Patriarch is dead!~1|You've met the Pompous Patriarch.~2|The Pompous Patriarch is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Pompous Patriarch's room.~4|You've accused the Pompous Patriarch.~200|In the end, the Pompous Patriarch survived.
Name: Suspects: The Pompous Patriarch

Description: Money can buy you a name, but it cannot buy talent.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Slouching Critic is dead!~1|You've met the Slouching Critic.~2|The Slouching Critic is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Slouching Critic's room.~4|You've accused the Slouching Critic.
Name: Suspects: The Slouching Critic

Description: Why dig for gold when it walks on two legs?
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Polite Heiress is dead!~1|You've met the Polite Heiress.~2|The Polite Heiress is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Polite Heiress' room.~4|You've accused the Polite Heiress.
Name: Suspects: The Polite Heiress

Description: A good servant is seen and not heard. Preferably not seen, either.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Silent Butler is dead!~1|You've met the Silent Butler.~2|The Silent Butler is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Silent Butler's room.~4|You've accused the Silent Butler.~100|The Silent Butler was the murderer!~110|The Silent Butler is wounded!~120|The Silent Butler is escaping!~150|The Silent Butler was the murderer's accomplice!
Name: Suspects: The Silent Butler

Description: He has a face that could knock you off your feet. Fists, too.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Suave Uncle is dead!~1|You've met the Suave Uncle.~2|The Suave Uncle is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Suave Uncle's room.~4|You've accused the Suave Uncle.
Name: Suspects: The Suave Uncle

Description: She's capable of anything, including nothing.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Bohemian Beau is dead!~1|You've met the Bohemian Beau.~2|The Bohemian Beau is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Bohemian Beau's room.~4|You've accused the Bohemian Beau.
Name: Suspects: The Bohemian Beau

Description: To have pretensions, one needs to not already be the best.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Firstborn Fop is dead!~1|You've met the Firstborn Fop.~2|The Firstborn Fop is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Firstborn Fop's room.~4|You've accused the Firstborn Fop.
Name: Suspects: The Firstborn Fop

Description: The second fiddle is just as expensive.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Parasitic Twin is dead!~1|You've met the Parasitic Twin.~2|The Parasitic Twin is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Parasitic Twin's room.~4|You've accused the Parasitic Twin.
Name: Suspects: The Parasitic Twin

Description: She has a certain je-ne-sais-quoi.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|The Final Girl is dead!~1|You've met the Final Girl.~2|The Final Girl is a suspect.~3|You've snooped in the Final Girl's room.~4|You've accused the Final Girl.~100|The Final Girl was the murderer!~150|The Final Girl was the murderer's accomplice!
Name: Suspects: The Final Girl

Description: So, that wasn't his first time at zee...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Fortunate Scion

Description: So, he's a disgraced soldier...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Pompous Patriarch

Description: So, he underwent a peculiar personality change...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Slouching Critic

Description: So, she's a frequent visitor to Parabola...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Polite Heiress

Description: So, he was a family friend before he was resurrected...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Silent Butler

Description: So, it seems he never really had a wife...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Suave Uncle

Description: So, she's a devoutee of Shade...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Bohemian Beau

Description: So, he resents his sister...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Firstborn Fop

Description: So, she wasn't always sickly...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Parasitic Twin

Description: So, she was never legally adopted...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Final Girl

Description: The mystery deepens...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Something terrible has been set in motion.
Name: Clayborne Place: Something Wicked

Description: So, something after the war made him very wealthy...
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Interesting...
Name: Reports: The Crumbling Elder

Description: Time to see how great a detective you really are.
LevelDescriptionText: 1|The Fortunate Scion has not been imprisoned.~2|The Pompous Patriarch has been imprisoned.~3|The Silent Butler has been imprisoned.~4|The Final Girl has not been imprisoned.~5|The Slouching Critic has been imprisoned.~6|The Polite Heiress has been imprisoned.~7|The Suave Uncle has not been imprisoned.~8|The Bohemian Beau has been imprisoned.~9|The twins have been imprisoned.
ChangeDescriptionText: 0|If at first you don't succeed...~1|The Fortunate Scion has not been imprisoned.~2|The Pompous Patriarch has been imprisoned.~3|The Silent Butler has been imprisoned.~4|The Final Girl has not been imprisoned.~5|The Slouching Critic has been imprisoned.~6|The Polite Heiress has been imprisoned.~7|The Suave Uncle has not been imprisoned.~8|The Bohemian Beau has been imprisoned.~9|The twins have been imprisoned.
Name: Clayborne Place: Accused!

Description: Coal, dug from zee-cliffs or the mines of Dis. [If you run out of fuel, you will drift helplessly.]
Name: Fuel

Description: A sinister little squatting image... but its eyes are pleading.
Name: Watchful Curio

Description: A hundred dreams in every barrel.
Name: Firkin of Prisoner's Honey

Description: Violant: the colour of necessary, but troublesome connections. According to other traditions, the colour of blood shed in a spired place. It's very hard to forget anything you've written in violant ink...
Name: Firkin of Violant Ink

Description: In smaller quantities, delightful and refreshing. In larger quantities, one of the very nicest ways to die.
Name: Solacefruit

Description: A precious recollection. Such things make voyages worthwhile.
Name: Memory of Distant Shores

Description: All the adventures of the heart are here, in prose, poetry or pictorial form. Some may be more suitable for private consumption.
Name: Romantic Literature

Description: [This provides the "Neathy Poems" storylet. Sell it to remove this storylet.]
Name: POEMS FOR CAPTAINS

Description: Devours engine emissions, ensuring that your engine never explodes at Full Power.
Name: Iron & Misery Avid Suppressor

Description: Carved from coral, or something like coral, or something that may have once been in the same room as coral.
Name: Apocyan Chess-Piece

Description: Oh, how it glitters.
Name: Neath Jade

Description: At some point, it stops being desecration and starts being science.
Name: Fossil

Description: Spare screws, hex keys, flasks of oil... everything a machine needs to stay healthy.
Name: A Gift for the Machine

Description: Far from dogs, but friendly enough if kept fed. [Ammunition for Ozao weapons.]
Name: Ztardog

Description: Containers within containers. What do they contain? Best not speculate.
Name: An Assortment of Uncomfortably Large Eggs

Description: The Château's finest. A gift worthy of kings.
Name: Cask of Château-Dessous 1866

Description: Well-trained and entirely loyal. You hope.
Name: Networks: A Diplomatic Agent

Description: It illuminates.
Name: Pearl of Light

Description: She knows the ins and outs of the Machine.
Name: Nervous Machinist

Description: It has a coppery smell to it. Probably copper. [Deliver this to The Human Factory.]
Name: A Barrel of "Parts"

Description: You never know when you might need one of these!
Name: A Heavy Wrench

Description: Don't dawdle. They grow up so fast.
Name: Children

Description: Considered a delicacy. Zailors who've lost eyes use these as replacements.
Name: Jellied Eyeball

Description: Creation. Destruction. Everything in the middle some muddied combination of the two.
Name: Botanist's Bible

Description: Dried, ground insects, sure to add a certain flavour to your food.
Name: Swarmspice

Description: The crew are nervous about keeping this aboard. You should be, too.
Name: Ereshkigal

Description: Never mind the contents. The fact that you need this is far more worrying.
Name: Ill-Advised Preventative Medicine

Description: The rocking of the boat is not having the soothing effect that it should. Bring a mop. [Drop this unfortunate character off at Laennec's Retreat.]
Name: Sickly Sailor

Description: Everything is a disgrace, all of it. [Drop this fellow off at End Paren.]
Name: Faded Provocateur

Description: Already pieces fall away like dandruff across the deck. [Drop this unfortunate character off at Crying Heights.]
Name: Crumbling Noman

Description: "What is property?" she asks, and seems annoyed when you define the term for her. [Drop her off at Namerigawa.]
Name: Oblivious Anarchist

Description: Leaving in style.
Name: Scented Deathmasque

Description: A single swipe can change history.
Name: Ceremonial Sword

Description: You've done London proud.
Name: Medal of Valor

Description: It clinks pleadingly.
Name: Jarred Memento

Description: The Shogun is pleased.
Name: Medal of Honour

Description: An ambered shard of seaglass, its edge as thin as the borders between realities.
Name: Heaven's Warning

Description: The interior is only half the story.
Name: Grimoire of Lost Secrets

Description: Has it been worth it, truly?
Name: Medal of War

Description: And now it never will be.
Name: Unfinished Painting

Description: Don't open it or it'll fall skyward.
Name: Elsewhere Souvenir

Description: It's all starting to come together.
Name: Zee Thesis

Description: But you can bear it, can't you?
Name: Burning Ring

Description: You're still not over it.
Name: Rare Postage

Description: It commands no respect, but tradition is tradition.
Name: Ringmaster's Hat

Description: But we all know why you really did it, don't we?
Name: Medal of Philanthropy

Description: It burns and burns but is never extinguished. What a thought, to know that traces of the Gods can be captured in a simple jar.
Name: Wyrmsbreath

Description: Remember, you paid for this.
Name: Esau's Ladder Advance Pass

Description: A pack a day keeps the doctors away.
Name: Box of Cigars

Description: Crude but effective.
Name: Gardeners' Axes

Description: Chess doesn’t drive people mad, it keeps mad people sane.
Name: Chess Piece

Description: Keep it secret. Keep it safe.
Name: Immaterial Dagger

Description: This will grant you access to Shogunate trade.
Name: Trade Permit

Description: Such treasures are only found under an equally blue sky.
Name: A Casket of Sapphires

Description: Green as the zee and twice as deadly.
Name: A Casket of Emeralds

Description: Rarer than good advice.
Name: A Casket of Rubies

Description: The soupy remains of ghosts and other spiritual entities.
Name: Ectoplasm

Description: What's this?
Name: An Old Map of Henson's Landing

Description: "25 paces North of the old signpost."
Name: A New Map of Henson's Landing

Description: A rod of this size could only catch very small fish.
Name: Fishing Rod

Description: Only valuable in very large numbers.
Name: Very Small Fish

Description: That's a lot of fish..
Name: A Very Large Sum Of Very Small Fish

Description: It ticks, but never tocks.
Name: Lucent Soul

Description: In these times, one must run as fast as they can just to stay where they are.
Name: Scientific Advancement

Description: Plants love it.
Name: Firkin of Fungal Water

Description: London's finest.
Name: Stock: The Iron and Misery Company

Description: The Shogunate's finest.
Name: Stock: Yamitoyami Enterprise

Description: The Umwelt Dynasty's finest.
Name: Stock: Still Life Dynamics

Description: Are you a high enough roller to bet on a god?
Name: Stock: Silver's Stash

Description: It's what, exactly?
Name: Stock: Cryptic Currency

Description: "What-ho!"
Name: Rock-Ribbed Colonial

Description: A fraction of the man he once was, figuratively and literally.
Name: Broken-Ribbed Colonial

Description: Admittedly they've left out a few details.
Name: Notice of a Great Man's Demise

Description: Entirely worthless
Name: Measuring Tools

Description: Without the contents, naturally.
Name: Old Letter

Description: None more fit than you!
Name: Certificate of Superior Health

Description: Such as it is.
Name: Proof of Legal Residency

Description: Who you are on paper need not be who you are.
Name: Proof of Pending Citizenship Application

Description: Squeaky clean, you are.
Name: Proof of Good Social Standing

Description: Almost, but not quite, what you're actually after.
Name: Business License Pre-Approval

Description: You have room for junk in your trunk.
Name: Verification of Trade Capacity

Description: Money turns heads, open doors, forces you to sign more forms.
Name: Proof of Financial Health

Description: Surely there could be no downside to something as delicious as this?
Name: Honey Cake

Description: Come one, come all!
Name: Carnival Ticket

Description: It finally arrived in the mail. [A captain of your lineage won riches and a comfortable retirement.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: An Expired Trading License.
Name: Trophy: An Expired Trading License

Description: Yes, but what was the author's intent? [This is stored safely in your Lodgings.]
Name: Great Work

Description: Of some value, but not much.
Name: Prize Token

Description: Commemorate it with a canticle.
Name: Diabolical Blueprint

Description: You are now the proud owner of a rotting fungal sump.
Name: Deed to a Winery

Description: Everything you need to make a home. Or something else.
Name: Building Materials

Description: Blinding in their complexity, and if you put them too close to your face.
Name: Mechanical Components

Description: Sticky. Impermanent. Indispensable.
Name: Organic Components

Description: Of debatable usefulness.
Name: Arcane Components

Description: Can be counted on not to spill the beans.
Name: Secretive Engineers

Description: What use is a looking-glass that obscures your vision?
Name: Telekailedoscope

Description: It wobbles slightly at your glance. [A captain of your lineage followed their dreams and was transported from this realm.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Lump of Extradimensional Matter.
Name: Trophy: A Lump of Extradimensional Matter

Description: And with strange aeons, even death may die.
Name: Incomparable Actress

Description: With articulated joints! [Someone in London will pay handsomely for this.]
Name: Very Weary Action Figure

Description: Incredible!
Name: Incredible Photograph

Description: What treasures lie among the natural world?
Name: Bestial Observation

Description: Your ship isn't the only one that's full of secrets.
Name: Nautical Observation

Description: You don't dare adjust it. [A captain of your lineage followed their dreams and was transported back in time.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Paradoxical Timepiece.
Name: Trophy: A Paradoxical Timepiece

Description: Apparently it was worth bending reality for. [A captain of your lineage followed their dreams and found a new, unlikely partner.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: An Empty Kibble Sack.
Name: Trophy: An Empty Kibble Sack

Description: Never again. Probably. [A captain of your lineage followed their dreams, but rejected what they found.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Torn Blueprint Fragment.
Name: Trophy: A Torn Blueprint Fragment

Description: ...Really?
Name: Sack of Deluxe Kibble

Description: To buried treasure? You hope? [Bring this to Blemmiglugh.]
Name: Piratical Map

Description: What has violence begotten you? [Use this at zee to summon the Jillyqueen.]
Name: Jillycaller

Description: What has violence begotten you? [Use this at zee to summon the Ztarchild.]
Name: Bone Whistle

Description: What?
Name: Dissonator

Description: It's dead, and not. A fish, and not. Strange, and stranger.
Name: Stranger Catch

Description: This tiny valve will ensure your engine never explodes at Full Power.
Name: Miniaturized Avid Suppressor

Description: This tiny lock will keep any unruly passengers from damaging your ship.
Name: Miniaturized Secure Compartment

Description: This is not only the currency of Arbor; it allows you to see further into dreams.
Name: Attar

Description: Make every shot count.
Name: Cannonball

Description: Will explode nastily over your foes. Do not drink.
Name: Biological Payload

Description: As dead as a machine can be.
Name: Mechanical Husk

Description: Surprisingly heavy.
Name: Dream Alloy Token

Description: Whomsoever wears this is difficult to recall afterwards.
Name: Irrigo Cloak

Description: The pale fire of a bargain to age but not to die.
Name: Sample of Amaranthine

Description: The colour of yearning, that drives fools into the unknown.
Name: Sample of Cutlast

Description: The color of the sands of time itself. And phlegm.
Name: Sample of Gumzendeith

Description: The concentrate of imagination.
Name: Sample of Iffigium

Description: The color of the deep Zee. And death. The callous ports that call to us.
Name: Sample of Portcallous

Description: The colour of a comfortable terror.
Name: Sample of Vantom

Description: The color of stasis, of what scrapes off a stagnating soul.
Name: Sample of Vimrust

Description: With this, the might of a god is within your grasp.
Name: Key to Rorschach's Heart

Description: Read it. Reeeeeeeeead it.
Name: Autographed Copy of an Untitled Book

Description: It's good enough to fool the untrained eye, which precludes any serious collectors with lots of cash.
Name: Counterfeit Treasure

Description: Utter swill in a very, very fancy bottle.
Name: Cask of Counterfeit Wine

Description: There's a good reason they don't normally let rats get this big.
Name: A Cage of Extraordinarily Large and Semi-Feral Rats

Description: They've gotten the smell right, but the eyes...
Name: Crate of Counterfeit Souls

Description: It illuminates, but does not warm.
Name: Box of Counterfeit Sunlight

Description: Faster, Toadie! Faster! [Bring this bug-band to ports of entertainment to perform.]
Name: Songweaver and Co.

Description: This should send some kind of message.
Name: Mistress' Calling Card

Description: Probably not actually shed from Wyrms, but who's to say?
Name: Wyrmknuckles

Description: Are these even still eggs? If not, you definitely don't want them to hatch.
Name: A Modified Assortment of Uncomfortably Large Eggs

Description: It chooses its words carefully.
Name: Particular Parrot

Description: Ready to go off at a moment's notice.
Name: Primed Parrot

Description: That is certainly not a colour pigs should be.
Name: Beastly Boar

Description: Squeaky clean!
Name: Bashful Boar

Description: Well, if they say so.
Name: Man Unconvincingly Disguised as a Dog

Description: Now this isn't believable at all.
Name: Man Slightly More Convincingly Disguised as a Dog

Description: Far from docile, uninterested in companionship, and not at all house-trained.
Name: Uncaged Creatures

Description: Just one dose, enough to change everything.
Name: Dose of Cantigaster Venom

Description: Never used, never will be. [A captain of your lineage brought peace to the Neath without violence.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Dusty Dose of Venom.
Name: Trophy: A Dusty Dose of Venom

Description: It's this that gets all the credit. [A captain of your lineage brought peace to the Neath through assassination.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Signed Copy of an Accord.
Name: Trophy: A Signed Copy of an Accord

Description: Often crumpled, never published. [A captain of your lineage brought peace to the Neath through extreme violence.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Wax-Sealed Confession.
Name: Trophy: A Wax-Sealed Confession

Description: Fervently devout and eager to please. You have given them purpose.
Name: Cultist

Description: Often crumpled, never published. [A captain of your lineage achieved a measure of godhood and died for it.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: Manacles of a Martyr.
Name: Trophy: Manacles of a Martyr

Description: It's the first you ever gave him. [A captain of your lineage achieved godhood.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: A Fallen Feather.
Name: Trophy: A Fallen Feather

Description: No amount of warmth can stop the trembles.
Name: Shivering Whaler

Description: Oof, that's gonna have to come off.
Name: Frostbitten Whaler

Description: It swirls even now. You should probably take this to Mr Feathers.
Name: Bottle of Cerebral Extract

Description: A token from Mr Feathers.
Name: Platinum Ring

Description: Salty.
Name: Liquid Melancholy

Description: It was worth it. Right? [A captain of your lineage destroyed everything.]
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|You now have a Trophy: Memory of a Broken World.
Name: Trophy: Memory of a Broken World

Description: The captain remembered, and felt sad for a while.
Name: Memory of a Dynasty

Description: Movement from above! Everybody duck!
Name: An Implausible Port Report: Wyrmsmouth

Description: Carnage in the stock market! Everybody run!
Name: An Implausible Port Report: Silver's Palace

Description: The seas swell! Everybody panic!
Name: An Implausible Port Report: The Krakenchute

Description: Read it and weep.
Name: Dangerous Doctored Document

Description: Who do you know who might know what this means?
Name: Ozaean Scrawlings

Description: You're so close to something. You're on the CUSP. You feel the need to write with CAPITAL LETTERS.
Name: Dreadful Manifesto

Description: You've made a few embellishments, of course. [Go to Your Lodgings to make use of this.]
Name: An Account of the Clayborne Murders

Description: Of little interest, so long as the coal keeps coming.
Name: A Port Report: the Infernal Canal

Description: You have seen the place where zee descends.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to The Infernal Canal has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: The Infernal Canal

Description: The horse: The best mode of transportation on the zee after the boat.
Name: A Port Report: Ormonde

Description: You have seen the fields where none may walk alone.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Ormonde has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Ormonde

Description: The Bitten survive because the Swarm allows it. The Swarm survives because the Bitten allow it.
Name: A Port Report: Culicida

Description: You have seen the place where the Swarm flies free.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Culicida has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Culicida

Description: The right words, perhaps, but very much the wrong place.
Name: A Port Report: The Gallery of Sentences

Description: You have seen the place where art and longing meet.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to The Gallery of Sentences has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: The Gallery of Sentences

Description: A successful end is not always a pleasant one.
Name: A Port Report: End Paren

Description: You have seen the ice and salt.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to End Paren has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: End Paren

Description: Repairs are underway. But to what ends?
Name: A Port Report: Kirai Komainu

Description: You've seen the scars where huamity's defenses failed.
Name: Surveyed: Kirai Komainu

Description: Language in bloom.
Name: A Port Report: Port Rosa

Description: You have seen the dawning of a new power.
Name: Surveyed: Port Rosa

Description: If only you could see inside...
Name: A Basic Port Report: Castle Kysamoto

Description: Now it's too loud. Too loud!
Name: A Comprehensive Port Report: Castle Kysamoto

Description: Do you hear music?
Name: Surveyed: Castle Kysamoto

Description: Why won't anybody believe you?
Name: A Port Report: Aphantasia

Description: You have seen the place that isn't there.
Name: Surveyed: Aphantasia

Description: A hand-me-down city, ripe for plucking.
Name: A Port Report: Dyi Ztar

Description: You have seen the city that the triumphant will claim.
Name: Surveyed: Dyi Ztar

Description: It's home. But that doesn't make it family.
Name: A Port Report: Fallen London

Description: A zoo, and nothing else.
Name: A Port Report: Bestiary

Description: You have seen such wonders within cages.
Name: Surveyed: Bestiary

Description: Wine is a complex affair.
Name: A Port Report: Château-Dessous

Description: You've been to the fountain of the rich and famous.
Name: Surveyed: Château-Dessous

Description: Just what humanity needed, another god.
Name: A Port Report: Arms of the Machine

Description: You've seen the birthplace of a mechanical god.
Name: Surveyed: Arms of the Machine

Description: It is important to understand that even in theory the payment of the worker is not determined by the value of his product.
Name: A Port Report: The Human Factory

Description: You've seen where the means of production lie.
Name: Surveyed: The Human Factory

Description: Crawling with anger. Thirsting for revenge.
Name: A Port Report: Ztargon's Remains

Description: You've seen the floating corpse of Ztargon.
Name: Surveyed: Ztargon's Remains

Description: A place to rest one's head, forever and ever.
Name: A Port Report: Hermitage

Description: You have seen the hermits among rocks.
Name: Surveyed: Hermitage

Description: Playtime?
Name: A Port Report: Faeble

Description: You have seen where the Fae tumble and play.
Name: Surveyed: Faeble

Description: Coexistence without suffering. A palace without a king.
Name: A Port Report: Paradise of Thorns

Description: You have seen where man and flower live in harmony.
Name: Surveyed: Paradise of Thorns

Description: Below, Rorschach dreams, while parasites strip its mind away.
Name: A Port Report: The Krakenchute

Description: You've seen the spike that pierced a deity.
Name: Surveyed: the Krakenchute

Description: A place destroyed by the secret it keeps.
Name: A Port Report: Rath Ruin

Description: You have seen the shattered remains of what came before.
Name: Surveyed: Rath Ruin

Description: Even now, you double-check yourself for signs of plague.
Name: A Port Report: Laennec's Retreat

Description: You have seen where the sick congregate in search of a healer.
Name: Surveyed: Laennec's Retreat

Description: Even the pages that describe it are warm and soot-smudged.
Name: A Port Report: Aditta

Description: You have bathed in the birthing-place of gods.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Aditta has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Aditta

Description: The ice glitters like gold.
Name: A Port Report: Silver's Palace

Description: You have walked where the god of commerce makes his home.
Name: Surveyed: Silver's Palace

Description: Be wary. The abyss is known to gaze back.
Name: A Port Report: Seaglass

Description: You have gazed into mirrors of starlight.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Seaglass has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Seaglass

Description: Who can say what those rich folk get up to?
Name: A Port Report: Clayborne Place

Description: An odd place. Best to keep an eye on it.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Clayborne Place has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Clayborne Place

Description: Perhaps it's best that they don't fully understand who they revere.
Name: A Port Report: The Old Magnanery

Description: You've met the spiders in London's shadow.
Name: Surveyed: The Old Magnanery

Description: Is all that we see or seem but a dream within a dream?
Name: A Port Report: Founder's Island

Description: You've walked a shimmering beach.
Name: Surveyed: Founder's Island

Description: The smell lingers on the pages.
Name: A Port Report: Blemmiglugh

Description: You have seen the land of failures and misguided ambitions.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Blemmiglugh has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Blemmiglugh

Description: What wants has a woman who has everything?
Name: A Port Report: Hypatia

Description: You have walked in the shadow of scientific advancement.
Name: Surveyed: Hypatia

Description: Mind you don't get snatched away.
Name: A Port Report: Trojan's Rook

Description: You have seen the Mistress' lair.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Your visit to Trojan's Rook has been confirmed by the Admiralty Records Office
Name: Surveyed: Trojan's Rook

Description: Ethical? Dubiously. Profitable? Undoubtedly.
Name: A Port Report: Crying Heights

Description: You've seen the wax-nets of the South.
Name: Surveyed: Crying Heights

Description: Terrors lurk where one most expects.
Name: A Port Report: Bracksoot

Description: You've seen the horrors of the world's edge.
Name: Surveyed: Bracksoot

Description: King for a lifetime! King for a day!
Name: A Port Report: Theatre of Tyrants

Description: You've seen the amusements of those who rule the zee.
Name: Surveyed: Theatre of Tyrants

Description: The only winning move is not to play.
Name: A Port Report: Oishigetta

Description: You've seen London's rivals in conflict.
Name: Surveyed: Oishigetta

Description: Art and death.
Name: A Port Report: Namerigawa

Description: You've seen the artistic side of the Shogunate.
Name: Surveyed: Namerigawa

Description: What manner of creature could survive such a place?
Name: A Port Report: Gabriel's Gate

Description: You have gazed into the border between this world and the World of Light.
Name: Surveyed: Gabriel's Gate

Description: You've seen enough to know to stay on the good side of the law.
Name: A Port Report: New Newgate

Description: You have marched where shadows dwell up high.
Name: Surveyed: New Newgate

Description: What do the voices of the dead mean to you?
Name: A Port Report: Neokamakura

Description: You've heard the voices of those long gone.
Name: Surveyed: Neokamakura

Description: A mobile fortress; London's rival.
Name: A Port Report: Kantai

Description: You've seen the seat of the immortal Shogun.
Name: Surveyed: Kantai

Description: An ever-changing concept uncaptured.
Name: A Port Report: Mekhane

Description: You have seen the untamed isle where anything could be.
Name: Surveyed: Mekhane

Description: Oh, on Henson's Landing there's an ancient tale...
Name: A Port Report: Henson's Landing

Description: You've seen where Clothfolk sing and play.
Name: Surveyed: Henson's Landing

Description: Tick tock.
Name: A Port Report: Sunshade Redoubt

Description: You've seen the returned souls of the Dusk Machine.
Name: Surveyed: Sunshade Redoubt

Description: An impossibility crawls above you. Better to think of them as stars.
Name: A Port Report: Wyrmsmouth

Description: You've seen something that perhaps you shouldn't have.
Name: Surveyed: Wyrmsmouth

Description: A glittering altar carved with the Serpent-Sigil of the Deep.
Name: Shrine to Shade

Description: The Herald of the Autumnal Feast lurks in your hold.
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Mr Gourds has boarded your ship.~0|Mr Gourds has departed.
Name: Mr Gourds

Description: What fury lurks within? Fury enough to propel you across the zee.
Name: The Clawing

Description: It reeks of something ancient and dreadful.
Name: Nergal's Roar

Description: From atop your bridge, she can project her brilliance onto the zee and revel in the many sights she sees.
Name: Lucent Soul Projector

Description: Fly it high, fly it proud!
Name: London Flag

Description: No honest Londoner would be caught dead flying this.
Name: Shogunate Flag

Description: Display your might to all who witness it!
Name: Ozao Flag

Description: Ally yourself with all that's green!
Name: Umwelt Flag

Description: Yo ho ho and a bottle of fine mushroom wine, because we are distinguished down here, blast it!
Name: Pirate Flag

Description: Shimmer and shake like the dead themselves!
Name: Ghost Flag

Description: Only the mightiest ships on the zee fly these!
Name: Clockwork Flag

Description: You can't help but look back and smile.
Name: Scrapbook of Superb Sightings

Description: A well-marketed cannon, popular with desperate captains and clueless hobbyists.
Name: Hast & Merrywort 'The Destructor' Mark VII

Description: Considered by many to be the true form of the Destructor.
Name: Hast & Merrywort 'The Destructor' Mark XIV

Description: A nasty bite for something so small.
Name: Maqrizi Sisters' 'Viper'

Description: "WOOF."
Name: Ozaean Deck-Mounted Dog Launcher

Description: Evokes images of heart-pounding combat and daring zee escapades.
Name: Cacklerock Industries 'Swashbuckle'

Description: "END THEM." A coldly efficient murder device.
Name: Cacklerock Industries 'Reaper'

Description: The light! It burns!
Name: Negatively Charged Photon Cannon

Description: A bite from the 'Moray' can last the rest of your very short lifetime.
Name: Furst & Spire 'Moray'

Description: A reliable effort from H&M, though as usual they've put most of their funds into marketing.
Name: Hast & Merrywort 'Dragoon'

Description: Piercer of hearts and hulls.
Name: Furst & Spire 'Swordfish'

Description: A hefty and reliable cause of death.
Name: Lyric & Grimsage 'Guillotine'

Description: Some say it's a matter of time before this form of combat becomes illegal.
Name: Maqrizi Sisters' 'Orange Blossom Scent #3'

Description: "BARK."
Name: Ozaean Forward-Mounted Dog Launcher

Description: Blood in the water.
Name: Furst & Spire 'Megalodon'

Description: Connecting here and there with explosive force.
Name: Cacklerock Industries 'Longspear'

Description: Breathe it in! Breathe deeply! Breathe your last!
Name: Maqrizi Sisters' 'Cherry Delight #5'

Description: Plausible? Probably not, but look at where you are.
Name: Solidified Neutrino Blaster

Description: It's plausible that H&M intended to make a rear-facing gun, and didn't simply install a regular one backwards. Plausible.
Name: Hast & Merrywort 'Intentionality'

Description: Defend yourself from all angles!
Name: Lyric & Grimsage Standard Point-Defense System

Description: Who could have seen this coming?
Name: Lyric & Grimsage 'Bewitched'

Description: An outdated delivery system for a very modern payload.
Name: Maqrizi Sisters' 'Catapault'

Description: "GRR."
Name: Ozaean Aft-Mounted Dog Launcher

Description: The end of the word in toxin delivery.
Name: Maqrizi Sisters' 'Trebuchet'

Description: Let nothing approach and survive.
Name: Cacklerock Industries Advanced Point-Defense System

Description: This ungodly creature folds around your existing engine like an anaconda attempting to devour a rhino.
Name: Organic Secondary Engine

Description: It emits a dreamlike light, ever-changing, revealing what may or may not be there.
Name: Dreamslime Pharos

Description: They work hard. They keep you safe. Their heads occasionally detach. [This trio of Oni soldiers will reduce crew requirements, but also crew capacity. They are fitted to an Auxiliary slot.]
Name: Rokurokubi Recruits

Description: A great dark slab of flesh and steel that tinkles musically on every exhalation.
Name: Turgid Organ

Description: It runs on positive thinking! This is the Neath, though, so fuel will have to do.
Name: Venator's Longing

Description: It doesn't point the way forward. It points the way you need to go.
Name: Awakening Candle

Description: Time to put your money where the mouth of your gun is.
Name: Golden Gun

Description: We're beyond caring about bad ideas at this point, aren't we?
Name: World Breaker

Description: Granted, his features are a little on the unusual side.
Name: Hairy Marksman

Description: Dashingly handsome, but you can't charm the zee.
Name: Perplexed Helmsman

Description: When nothing is worth cooking, nothing gets cooked.
Name: Fastidious Gourmet

Description: She's not much for splints or bandages, but it's amazing what a kindly word can do.
Name: Unlicensed Therapist

Description: She's rather taken with you, and perhaps too keen for her own good.
Name: Impressionable Student

Description: It prefers to shimmy rather than walk, and cannot be cajoled into a run.
Name: Prancing Pony

Description: It hails from another world. Is it another world? Or an unseen part of this one?
Name: Angelic Moth

Description: Its artifial eyes pick up the slightest glint. It enjoys snatching zailors' hats.
Name: Mechanical Magpie

Description: Someone has taken to moving it about the ship when you're not looking. Charming, if startling.
Name: Gigantic Stuffed Spider

Description: From a distance it looks like a stone. Up close, it looks like a stone with a smile.
Name: Personable Tortoise

Description: This adorable little friend loves to sing and dance for your crew, and even helps out around the ship! What a star!
Name: Lovable Little Buddy

Description: When she thinks you're not listening, she curses to herself in the tongues of far-off lands.
Name: Scorned Translator

Description: He's got sunshine on a Neathy day.
Name: Sunny Surfacer

Description: An aura of dark mystery suffuses him, but his piercing gaze discourages your own.
Name: Grim Quartermaster

Description: She darts about in dim corners of the engine room, appearing to rather wish that she was anywhere else.
Name: Frightened Apprentice

Description: Her mood has much improved. Her visibility has not.
Name: Outgoing Apprentice

Description: Time among the Ozao has changed his features... and perhaps more.
Name: Weary Ambassador

Description: She seems always on the cusp of violence, even away from the guns.
Name: Pale Widow

Description: It's easier to see once the veil is lifted.
Name: Blushing Widow

Description: What use is a legend that nobody's heard of?
Name: Shrunken Hero

Description: Thankfully, her food is far less foul than her attitude.
Name: Noxious Butcher

Description: Whom does he really serve?
Name: Shadowed Servant

Description: The zee inspires fear in some and fervor in others.
Name: Gregarious Occultist

Description: What was once a blind faith has opened its eyes.
Name: Wide-Eyed Occultist

Description: It's bravery to commit to science in a land bereft of reason.
Name: Dubious Naturalist

Description: Madness can, itself, be an answer.
Name: Loathing Naturalist

Description: One who has seen the majesty of the world and found it wanting.
Name: Invigorated Naturalist

Description: Prize within reach, he now turns to you.
Name: Deep Zee Hunter

Description: Rich and respected - but a hunter is never satisfied.
Name: Satisfied Zee Hunter

Description: All the zee's a stage.
Name: Incomparable Actress

Description: Though seemingly docile, there's an ancient anger in its eyes.
Name: Intrusive Ozao

Description: A jovial nature is undercut by steely nerves and precise movements.
Name: Rambunctious Ronin

Description: To look at him, one would think he was the most hated man in the Neath. Quite the opposite.
Name: Weariest Ambassador

Description: A fellow of infinite jest, of most excellent fancy.
Name: Yore

Description: Her most prized possession? Herself.
Name: Energetic Energumen

Description: How might he sound? Ancient and creaking, like himself? Or soft from years of disuse?
Name: Mute Ventriloquist

Description: Lovingly maintained despite its age.
Name: Devilish Doll

Description: Always on the prowl for justice.
Name: Manic Magistrate

Description: She'll keep your crew as strong as oxen. And as nervous as horses.
Name: Tidy Veterinarian

Description: It was never going to stop with just one.
Name: Haunted Widow

Description: Sail into the unknown. Drink wine. Smash a mirror. Live a little.
Name: Tilted Tinkerer

Description: It's a beautiful day on the Unterzee, and you have a Horrible Goose.
Name: Horrible Goose

Description: Watch out! It's got nippers!
Name: Diminutive Crustacean

Description: With its heads sleeping asynchronously, this hound dog can cry ALL the time.
Name: Mercurial Hound

Description: Your gaze drifts from it. You don't want to think about it.
Name: Pale Zee-Bat

Description: This doesn't seem right to you, but it probably knows more about aardvarks than you do.
Name: All-Knowing Aardvark

Description: This bouncing, ghostly head is a reminder that sometimes, things just work out on their own.
Name: Woodcutter's Head

Description: Fiery and revitalized, he has years of regrets to make up for.
Name: Reborn Ventriloquist

Description: Her meals taste woody and informative, like flavour text.
Name: Posey

Description: Get thee glass eyes, and like a scurvy politician seem to see the things thou dost not.
Name: Yore

Description: This ship sees use by two kinds of captains: those who have total condifence in what they are doing, and those who do not.
Name: Enmesharra-class Steam Launch

Description: The starting ship for many an amateur zee-captain, often found littering the zee floor.
Name: Alala-class Steamer

Description: An inexpensive hunting vessel for inexpensive hunts.
Name: Belili-class Cutter

Description: Zail confidently and in style.
Name: Anshar-class Steam-Yacht

Description: A solid purchase for those angling for a scrap.
Name: Kishar-class Corvette

Description: A top-of-the-line transport vessel. With a heated steering wheel!
Name: Abzu-class Merchant Cruiser

Description: It's time to bring the fight back to the zee.
Name: Tiamat-class Frigate

Description: It smells foul to some and delectable to others. Usually not the ones you'd want.
Name: Rorschach's Heart

Description: Blessed by the Shogun. Feared by zee-beasts. Its reputation precedes even yours.
Name: The Susanoo

Description: Your way.
LevelDescriptionText: ~5|Go to Crying Heights~6|Pick up your cargo at Crying Heights~7|Complete three deliveries~8|You declined immortality as a noman~9|Your crime was discovered~10|You have a backup~11|Your backup was awakened early!~99|You are a noman~100|You're hunting yourself~110|You killed yourself
ChangeDescriptionText: ~5|Go to Crying Heights~6|Pick up your cargo at Crying Heights~7|Complete three deliveries~8|You declined immortality as a noman~9|Your crime was discovered~10|You have a backup~11|Your backup was awakened early!~99|You are a noman~100|You're hunting Yourself~110|You killed Yourself
Name: Crying Heights: A Mirror Brightly

Description: What indeed?
Name: Crying Heights: Wander

Description: The cold shoulder.
Name: Crying Heights: Speak

Description: Caw! Caw!
Name: Crying Heights: Listen

Description: It brings life. Or animates the dead. What DOES it do?
Name: Lacre

Description: He looks like a well-dressed snowman.
Name: Travelling Noman

Description: You've heard a tale of death and rebirth.
Name: Crying Heights: A Noman's Story

Description: A taste of eternity in every drop!
LevelDescriptionText: 1|Deliver lacre to Château-Dessous~2|Speak to the Travelling Noman~3|Deliver lacre to The Human Factory~4|Speak to the Travelling Noman~5|Bring the Travelling Noman to Fallen London, or kill him~6|Report the Travelling Noman's demise at Fallen London~7|Return to Crying Heights~9|Everything is probably perfectly alright
ChangeDescriptionText: 1|Deliver lacre to Château-Dessous~2|Speak to the Travelling Noman~3|Deliver lacre to The Human Factory~4|Speak to the Travelling Noman~5|Bring the Travelling Noman to Fallen London, or kill him~6|Report the Travelling Noman's demise at Fallen London~7|Return to Crying Heights~9|Everything is probably perfectly alright
Name: Objective: Lacre Deliveries

Description: There's more than one way out of this.
Name: Disarming Shots

Description: You left something in Crying Heights.
ChangeDescriptionText: 2|Something is different...
Name: A Backup

Description: Just snow. Nothing suspicious about it. Nuh uh. [A previous captain in your lineage set a noman replica loose on the Unterzee.]
Name: Trophy: A Bucket of Ordinary Snow

Description: You will find your other self. It's only a matter of time.
LevelDescriptionText: ~1|Return to Crying Heights~2|Follow your other self to the Infernal Canal ~3|Follow your other self to the Paradise of Thorns~4|Follow your other self to Laennec's Retreat~5|Follow your other self to End Paren~6|Follow your other self to Seaglass~7|You defeated Yourself~10|You let Yourself go
ChangeDescriptionText: ~1|Return to Crying Heights~2|Follow your other self to the Infernal Canal ~3|Follow your other self to the Paradise of Thorns~4|Follow your other self to Laennec's Retreat~5|Follow your other self to End Paren~6|Follow your other self to Seaglass~7|You defeated Yourself~10|You let Yourself go
Name: Objective: The Pursuit

Description: Optimism or self-delusion?
Name: Crying Heights: Friendly Thoughts

Description: Necessity or egoism?
Name: Crying Heights: Unfriendly Thoughts

Description: There's only one way out of this.
Name: Killing Shots
